Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ozmanthus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Ozmanthus designed and perfected his own Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Ozmanthus chose a Path of pure destruction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Ozmanthus was a renowned Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Ozmanthus manifested the Death Icon after creating a device to kill and revive himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Ozmanthus developed the bloodline ability to see when he advanced to Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Ozmanthus named his House after the city he sought, Arelia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Ozmanthus used a black hammer and soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Ozmanthus attempted to create Penance as a perfect weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Ozmanthus has a projection that Lindon's friend was fighting.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Ozmanthus has workshops that have not been plundered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Ozmanthus left an echo that gave Lindon direction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Ozmanthus had workshops and foundries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Ozmanthus is the same person as Eithan Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Ozmanthus had a natural sense for madra manipulation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Ozmanthus is a figure who may have explained things to the children.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Ozmanthus returns from beyond.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Ozmanthus created prototypes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Ozmanthus rose to prominence under Malice's watch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Ozmanthus spun the cloak that surrounded him in a delicate dance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Ozmanthus projected an attack that struck Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Ozmanthus destroyed Reigan Shen's vaults.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Reigan Shen mentioned Ozmanthus to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Ozmanthus is associated with techniques that might change a user.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Dross conveys Ozmanthus's lethal will to Yerin through memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Ozmanthus is a character whom Eithan considers when making choices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ozmanthus advised the young Void Sage to use others' perception as a looking-glass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Ozmanthus proved one could come back.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Ozmanthus expressed hope for Lindon's success.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
